title: Manufacturing Engineer - Godrej Appliances - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Godrej Appliances - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Appliances are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Appliances:
Godrej Appliances is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances!
